name: Hedgehogs
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the nuts and dates together.
2. Add the coconut, brown sugar, and eggs to the ground mixture.
3. Mix all ingredients until well combined.
4. Form the mixture into small rolls.
5. Roll each roll in extra coconut to cover completely.
6. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit until the coconut is slightly browned.
